name: xchatbot
description: Cloudflare Workers 消息处理机器人

scripts.kv:seed:local: wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:common:mapping" --path "./_docs/common-plugins.json" --local && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:parameterized:mapping" --path "./_docs/common-plugins-dynamic.json" --local && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:workflow:mapping" --path "./_docs/common-plugins-workflow.json" --local
scripts.kv:seed:remote: wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:common:mapping" --path "./_docs/common-plugins.json" && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:parameterized:mapping" --path "./_docs/common-plugins-dynamic.json" && wrangler kv key put --binding XBOT_KV "plugins:workflow:mapping" --path "./_docs/common-plugins-workflow.json"
scripts.dev:seed: npm run kv:seed:local && npm run dev
